---
id: get-used-namespaces
title: "Get used namespaces"
description: "Returns all used project namespaces. Response contains default (null) namespace if used."
sidebar_label: "Get used namespaces"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get used namespaces"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/used-namespaces"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all used project namespaces. Response contains default (null) namespace if used.
